programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carol visits Lynn's with a present for Lorraine, Mark refuses to pull his weight on the farm, and Eric wants Michael and Elizabeth to start talking again(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally talks to Joe about her tax, Liz tells Willmore she wants to carry on at The Queens, and Denise refuses to talk to Hanif when he calls(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim feels betrayed by Steve and Andy, who move in with Liz at the Queens, while Reg enrages Alf when he lowers his offer for the shop(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Mary's past catches up with her when an unwelcome visitor delivers an ultimatum, as secrets and rifts threaten the unity of the family. News about the running of Downton Hospital puts Violet on the warpath, while those below stairs find social changes are putting their futures in jeopardy and Daisy's good intentions at the Mallerton House auction have disastrous consequences. Final series of the costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Michelle Dockery(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica uncovers bitter rivalry at an ice-cream company and it all appears to be tied in with the secret ingredient used to fortify the product(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Sunny makes further investigations into David Walker's life that suggest he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Cassie has a prickly chat with Marion about her past and the inquiry reveals her close relationship with an IRA activist. As the police investigation encroaches on their life, Sara and Colin open up to their partners with secrets about their past. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Wendy Craig and Holly Aird(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Marion jeopardises her marriage by refusing to open up about the past to her husband, Colin is blackmailed even further and the secrets of Sara's past push her family to breaking point. A disturbing allegation about David opens up a second line of inquiry, and when Tessa is called in for questioning again it threatens to ruin her relationships with her husband and son. Cold-case crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Rosie Cavaliero, Mark Bonnar, Badria Timini and Lorraine Ashbourne(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is touchy when Joe mentions Neil to her, Archie and Seth's truffle-hunting venture begins in earnest, and Lorraine has some shocking news for Lynn(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim and Liz move into the Queen's, Angie breaks down when Neil leaves, and Gordon does not want to rush things with Raquel(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise puts Fiona off when she asks for a rise, Angie is depressed about her future, and Don takes Martin to the Queen's to celebrate his birthday(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A mysterious visitor is suspected of involvement in the theft of a priceless Ming vase. Mike tries to discover the reason for Merton's visit to headquarters and Gina starts acting like Aidensfield's answer to Mata Hari. Nostalgic drama, guest starring Leslie Grantham(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jessica manages to break out of the castle dungeon - but the murderer is still at large. Whodunnit, guest starring Rod Taylor (The Birds) with Angela Lansbury,(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack suggests Mum should take on the job of cook at the depot canteen. Classic comedy, starring Bob Grant and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Blakey turn out to be the only entrants in a gardening competition organised by the depot manager's wife. Seventies comedy, starring Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby wines and dines Miss Jones in a suit surreptitiously 'borrowed' from stroppy wrestler Spooner - who turns up halfway through the main course intent on exacting revenge. Vintage comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The first episode of the whimsical rural drama based on HE Bates' novels. Tax collector Cedric Charlton visits the Larkin household intent on getting the head of the family - Pop - to correctly fill out his tax forms. In so doing he falls for attractive daughter Mariette. Starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A murder gives rise to rumours of a communist conspiracy. Poirot becomes the centre of attention at the Chelsea Flower Show as he views a rose named in his honour, while Hastings receives a packet of seeds that give him hay fever. Whodunit, guest starring Anne Stallybrass (Heartbeat), with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A man who has not been heard of in 20 years and was presumed dead suddenly makes an appearance in Aidensfield - and seems not to have aged a day - prompting Merton to cross swords with an old adversary. Meanwhile, Vernon's attempts to bring a taste of France to North Yorkshire are swiftly ruined as a wine connoisseur dishes the dirt on Scripps' vineyards(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lorraine's social worker turns up, Mark asks Annie to bring up his wages at the farm meeting, and Neil pays Kim a surprise visit(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally finds Jonathan a handful as he is so unsettled, Denise asks the bank for a loan, Gordon gives Raquel lessons in cricket theory, and Jim accuses Liz of flirting with Willmore(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: The brewery wants Liz to go on a personnel management course, Jim refuses to help her at the pub, and Denise is stunned when Don gives her a cheque for 3,000 pounds(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When director Nick Cheyney is found beheaded by a guillotine on the set of his latest film, Barnaby and Jones are left with no shortage of suspects. The victim, it transpires, was on poor terms with several people in some way connected to the project, including the mother of his child, and an actor who blamed him for ruining his career. Guest starring Nicky Henson(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Preparations are under way for Rose's wedding, but family tensions on both sides threaten to derail proceedings. Edith's arrangement with Marigold is happily working out, but how long can she and Cora conceal the truth from Robert? Denker reveals an unexpected side to her personality, which causes trouble for more than one of the servants. With the war memorial due to be unveiled, Mrs Patmore is still upset, but Robert has something up his sleeve. Branson comes to a heart-wrenching decision, and the storm clouds that have been gathering over Anna and Bates finally burst(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Not for the first time, Jessica delves behind the scenes of the film industry, this time to investigate a stuntman's death in what should have been a routine car crash. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is delighted by the arrival of his older brother Sam, but their reunion turns to misery when Martin delivers bad news to one of them. Louisa searches for a new home in the village and visits Edith for a check-up, where she reveals an embarrassing piece of information, and Al makes his situation with Pauline worse by trying to act on advice from Bert. Starring Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al tries to raise some quick cash, and offers to sort out all Louisa's household and plumbing problems if she can pay him promptly. The teacher gets good news on the employment front, and Martin accidentally inflicts a minor wound on an elderly patient - who responds by walking out of the surgery and vowing never to return. Drama, starring Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz, with Phyllida Law and Benjamin Whitrow(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: It's Murray and Bailey this week, as Rachel travels to Bristol with the DCI, who is advising on a rape and murder case that bears similarities to one she worked on 13 years previously involving the deaths of four women. Back at home, meanwhile, the detective discovers her brother Dom has been prostituting himself in her flat - and also learns the charges against her ex-boyfriend Nick are being dropped(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The duo look into the murder of an eight-year-old boy, coming up against a paedophile who cruelly deceives his victim's family. Dom's HIV test comes back negative, so he sets out to celebrate - only to endanger his own life and jeopardise Rachel's sergeant's exam in the process. Janet tells Andy she is having second thoughts about their brief liaison, but he finds her decision hard to accept. Suranne Jones and Lesley Sharp star, with Liam Boyle, Nicholas Gleaves and Joe Duttine(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan offers to redecorate Arthur and Olive's bedroom, taking the distinctive green and yellow paint from the depot. However, once the paint is applied, it becomes clear there is a problem. Reg Varney stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Mum is wooed by a middle-aged Lothario who not only tries to take over the entire house, but even manages to con an unwitting Stan and Arthur into doing his laundry(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby asks Philip for a native charm to help him seduce the delectable Ruth - but his dreams of a romantic liaison soon go up in smoke. Comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Taxman Charley decides to escape from the office and go strawberry-picking with Mariette and the rest of the Larkin family - a move that leaves his career hanging in the balance. Light-hearted drama based on the novels by HE Bates, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mike gets involved in the troubles of a newcomer and her unruly daughter, only to learn her dark past is about to catch up with her in the form of a ruthless reporter. Meanwhile, Vernon decides there is money to be made from goat's milk. Jason Durr stars(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lorraine tells her shocking story to Carol, who cannot believe she never knew what her husband was doing to her(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim slips off to Harrogate to do some shopping without Frank, Eric and Elizabeth are finding it difficult to adapt to living together, and Annie plans to sell her farm shares(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don assures Denise he was not trying to buy her favours, Sally is pleased when Jonathan begins to settle down, and Jim finds Willmore in the bedroom with Liz(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim moves back into number 11, Willmore tells Liz the problem is her husband, not her, and Angie asks Steve to model a jacket she has made(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: It's the early autumn of 1924 and Rose's father-in-law Lord Sinderby has rented Brancaster Castle in Northumberland and invited the Crawleys to a grouse-shooting party. However, the Sinderbys' butler Stowell (guest star Alun Armstrong, New Tricks) has an axe to grind and a scandalous secret threatens to derail the holiday. Back at Downton, the servants hold the fort and unlikely later-life romances abound, while Bates takes drastic measures to clear Anna's name as she faces an uncertain future behind bars. The seasons change and another Christmas is enjoyed at the Abbey, where a heartbreaking farewell and a joyful reunion take place. Feature-length festive special, starring Hugh Bonneville, Maggie Smith, James Faulkner, Penny Downie, Joanne Froggatt and Brendan Coyle(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits a New York auction to buy a valuable manuscript and uncovers foul play among her rival bidders. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury as a crime writer with a mystery-solving sideline(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. The detective receives a disturbing phone message from estranged brother Roy and heads to Harrogate to find him. Meanwhile at a murder scene, the team is introduced to new recruit Helen Morton, who quickly alienates her colleagues with her tactless style. The officer then makes matters worse when she finds evidence linking Banks to the victim's body and speculates he could be a suspect. Unaware everyone is searching for him, the DCI begins to delve into Roy's life and soon uncovers questionable business transactions and associates. Crime drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson, with Caroline Catz (Doc Martin) and Andrea Lowe(n)

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The detective visits his childhood home to break the news of Roy's death, and his parents plead with him to find out what happened. Defying Morton, Banks returns to the station in an attempt to lead the investigation into the murders of his brother and Jennifer Lewis, and both officers are convinced the key to cracking the cases lies with a woman being treated at a clinic(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth has retired to a charming English village in the hope of finding peace and quiet. However, the murder of a rich industrialist neighbour forces him to leave his new lifestyle behind as he plunges into a sordid world of blackmail and envy, aided by the dogged Chief Inspector Japp. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, Philip Jackson, Malcolm Terris and Oliver Ford Davies(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A radio control system is introduced at the depot, but Jack and Stan bring chaos to the airwaves, treating the new technology as nothing more than a lark(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Dense fog leaves Stan and Jack stranded, forcing them to spend a cold, miserable night on the bus, with nothing to eat and miseryguts Blakey for company(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Temperamental tenant Spooner, a professional wrestler, is confined to his room with a broken leg, and makes life hell for Alan and Philip by playing his radio full-blast at all hours - so naturally they challenge Rigsby to confront him. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ma can hardly contain her enthusiasm now that Mariette and Charley have announced their intention to marry. Unfortunately, Pop puts all his finances into bidding for a stately home, casting a shadow over her extravagant plans for the wedding. Rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nicholson delays his 21st-birthday celebrations to join Bellamy in pursuit of two armed and dangerous criminals, but takes one risk too many. Meanwhile, Vernon finds himself blowing his own trumpet after hiring out a brass band to Lord Ashfordly. Rural police drama, starring Ryan Early and Mark Jordon(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carol visits Lynn's with a present for Lorraine, Mark refuses to pull his weight on the farm, and Eric wants Michael and Elizabeth to start talking again(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally talks to Joe about her tax, Liz tells Willmore she wants to carry on at The Queens, and Denise refuses to talk to Hanif when he calls(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim feels betrayed by Steve and Andy, who move in with Liz at the Queens, while Reg enrages Alf when he lowers his offer for the shop(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Mary's past catches up with her when an unwelcome visitor delivers an ultimatum, as secrets and rifts threaten the unity of the family. News about the running of Downton Hospital puts Violet on the warpath, while those below stairs find social changes are putting their futures in jeopardy and Daisy's good intentions at the Mallerton House auction have disastrous consequences. Final series of the costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Michelle Dockery(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica uncovers bitter rivalry at an ice-cream company and it all appears to be tied in with the secret ingredient used to fortify the product(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Sunny makes further investigations into David Walker's life that suggest he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Cassie has a prickly chat with Marion about her past and the inquiry reveals her close relationship with an IRA activist. As the police investigation encroaches on their life, Sara and Colin open up to their partners with secrets about their past. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Wendy Craig and Holly Aird(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: A new patient is admitted to the ward, and an atmosphere of resentment develops when he is allocated the coveted bed by the window. The first episode of the hospital sitcom, starring James Bolam, Christopher Strauli and Peter Bowles(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to act as go-between, taking ransom money to the kidnappers of the wayward daughter of a rich film producer. However, he has a trick up his sleeve - quite literally - in the shape of a camera disguised as a wrist-watch, so even though he is blindfolded, he can later retrace his steps. Roger Moore directs and stars(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Captain McNeil's wife is kidnapped by a drug dealer who demands the police destroy all evidence of his crimes. A letter she left for her husband may hold a clue to her whereabouts(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The medical examiner performs an autopsy when a man demands answers over the death of his brother, who died following an operation by an eminent surgeon(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry intervenes in a tug-of-love dispute concerning an Anglo-Italian Mancini family, and finds himself unwittingly threatening the success of Arthur's latest money-making venture - a health club. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star(n)

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana
programme.desc: Action from the ninth stage of the Grand Tour race - a 94.4km course from Andorra la Vella to Cortals d'Encamp. Gary Imlach presents, with reports from Daniel Friebe and commentary by Ned Boulting and David Millar(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The thief encounters a deposed king-turned-crooked gambler(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A spiritualist has a vision of a woman being strangled, and Theo seeks her help when a real murder occurs that matches her story. Guest starring Ruth Gordon (Rosemary's Baby)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Touched by the plight of a woman suffering from a degenerative nerve disease, Quincy decides to fight the government and drug companies to ensure she gets the medication she needs(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur witnesses the untimely death of a business acquaintance, for which Chisholm appears to hold an old friend of Terry's accountable. In the circumstances, a spell in hospital seems like a good idea - but not all of Arthur's visitors arrive with flowers and grapes. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Though it is later proved he got a legitimate loan and is innocent of theft, the youngster finds himself being blackmailed after falling foul of some very dangerous individuals. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Silverstone Classic
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Louise Goodman present highlights of the 29th edition of the motor racing festival, which was held over three days at the famous British motorsport circuit. Among the anniversaries honoured were Jackie Stewart's maiden win at Silverstone in 1969, 100 years of Bentley and a half-century of the Ford Capri(n)

programme.title: Speed Freaks
programme.desc: Zef Eisenberg takes a masterclass in drifting to help him control his car when he makes his record attempt at Pendine Sands, and he also looks for tyres for his Porsche. Plus, the Speed Freaks turn a Daihatsu delivery van into a drift car(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: In the first episode, Billy and Sheron celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary with a holiday, but Rob's imminent arrival with a special friend is likely to cause a family feud. Meanwhile, Sam is left in charge at the Solana, and cannot resist trying to make some extra cash by organising a raffle in Neptunes, and anticipation is in the air as Joyce and Monty's big day arrives. However, things go from bad to worse when Monty finds himself, and the guests, in quite a predicament, and it's up to Kenneth to save the day(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies (1997)
programme.desc: James Bond joins forces with a Chinese agent to foil a media mogul's scheme to start a war between their countries - a case complicated by the fact that an old flame is now married to his new enemy. Using an undetectable stealth ship, the press baron plans to launch an undetectable sneak attack on both nations' navies, knowing they will blame each other - giving him exclusive global media coverage of the resulting conflict. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Jonathan Pryce, Teri Hatcher and Michelle Yeoh(n)

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest entertainment news(n)

programme.title: Motorsport UK

Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Mysterious events unfold involving a beautiful blonde, and Templar gets behind the wheel of a rally car. Last-ever episode of the vintage adventure series, starring Roger Moore(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part one of two. Theo makes a deal with a businessman facing prison to go undercover and help bring down a loan shark. Drama, guest starring Eli Wallach and Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A fellow medical examiner begins making basic mistakes that put her job on the line, so Quincy tries to discover why her work is suddenly starting to suffer(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur makes his way in the glamorous world of fashion by selling on some fake designer label clothes to a buyer, only to find himself relegated to minding the frocks. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. The hitherto innocent son manages to play-off his parent's ex-cohorts against one another with increasing dexterity and appears only too keen to pick up the duplicitous traits of his late father. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana
programme.desc: Action from the 10th stage of the Grand Tour race - a 36.2km individual time-trial from Jurancon to Pau. Gary Imlach presents, with reports from Daniel Friebe and commentary by Ned Boulting and David Millar(n)

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: How malt vinegar is brewed, how Aga stoves are made to last a lifetime and a chance to see the work taking place at Britain's last remaining tennis ball factory(n)

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough (1999)
programme.desc: James Bond is assigned to protect the heiress of an oil dynasty after her father is killed in a bombing at MI6 headquarters. The attack is the work of an infamous terrorist who is unable to feel pain after surviving a gunshot to his head, and who now intends to destroy the world's supply of oil. programme.desc: Captain McNeil's wife is kidnapped by a drug dealer who demands the police destroy all evidence of his crimes. A letter she left for her husband may hold a clue to her whereabouts(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The thief encounters a deposed king-turned-crooked gambler(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A spiritualist has a vision of a woman being strangled, and Theo seeks her help when a real murder occurs that matches her story. Guest starring Ruth Gordon (Rosemary's Baby)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Touched by the plight of a woman suffering from a degenerative nerve disease, Quincy decides to fight the government and drug companies to ensure she gets the medication she needs(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur witnesses the untimely death of a business acquaintance, for which Chisholm appears to hold an old friend of Terry's accountable. In the circumstances, a spell in hospital seems like a good idea - but not all of Arthur's visitors arrive with flowers and grapes. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Though it is later proved he got a legitimate loan and is innocent of theft, the youngster finds himself being blackmailed after falling foul of some very dangerous individuals. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Silverstone Classic
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Louise Goodman present highlights of the 29th edition of the motor racing festival, which was held over three days at the famous British motorsport circuit. Among the anniversaries honoured were Jackie Stewart's maiden win at Silverstone in 1969, 100 years of Bentley and a half-century of the Ford Capri(n)

programme.title: Speed Freaks
programme.desc: Zef Eisenberg takes a masterclass in drifting to help him control his car when he makes his record attempt at Pendine Sands, and he also looks for tyres for his Porsche. Plus, the Speed Freaks turn a Daihatsu delivery van into a drift car(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: In the first episode, Billy and Sheron celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary with a holiday, but Rob's imminent arrival with a special friend is likely to cause a family feud. Meanwhile, Sam is left in charge at the Solana, and cannot resist trying to make some extra cash by organising a raffle in Neptunes, and anticipation is in the air as Joyce and Monty's big day arrives. However, things go from bad to worse when Monty finds himself, and the guests, in quite a predicament, and it's up to Kenneth to save the day(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies (1997)
programme.desc: James Bond joins forces with a Chinese agent to foil a media mogul's scheme to start a war between their countries - a case complicated by the fact that an old flame is now married to his new enemy. Using an undetectable stealth ship, the press baron plans to launch an undetectable sneak attack on both nations' navies, knowing they will blame each other - giving him exclusive global media coverage of the resulting conflict. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Jonathan Pryce, Teri Hatcher and Michelle Yeoh(n)

He examines whether the nation's ageing infrastructure can cope with this ever more brutal onslaught, and what effect it will have on agriculture and the cost of living(n)

programme.title: Countdown to Murder

programme.title: A Killer At Home (2018)
programme.desc: Student Kristen takes a break from college and returns home - only to find a handsome stranger has residency of her room. Her mother explains she has talen in a tenant to help with the house expenses, but as time progresses Kristen learns not only are the pair sleeping together, but that the newcomer has a secret, dangerous past. Thriller, starring Lorynn York, Tanya Clarke and James Maslow(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler begins to have grave doubts about new flatmate Eddie - just as Joey starts house-hunting. Meanwhile, the girls try to get in touch with their inner selves using a personal empowerment manual for inspiration. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica's boyfriend makes a good impression on Chandler and Joey. Phoebe gets a shock while watching a film and Rachel begins to resent Ross planning their future. US comedy, starring Courteney Cox, David Schwimmer and Lisa Kudrow(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi is curious about an old photograph of Shane in Mackenzie's belongings, and Bea is annoyed when Elly rejects Finn's offer to accompany her to antenatal class(n)

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: Cricket on 5
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the opening day of the Fourth Test in the five-match series, held at Emirates Old Trafford. Anticipation for this encounter has been at fever pitch since the Third Test at Headingley, when Ben Stokes' incredible final-day innings helped England to one of their greatest victories in the history of the sport, and levelled the series at 1-1(n)

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Regular patient Sylvia arrives at Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford for her diabetes review, and although it is well-controlled, Dr Amir Khan is concerned about her weight. Dr Hassan Ahmed treats a girl who has been brought in by her mother suffering from a swollen belly and skin rashes, and nurse Leslie talks to colleague Shainade about the menopause and whether she should go on HRT(n)

programme.title: World's Greatest Warships
programme.desc: Charting the history of the warship from the dawn of the 20th century to the present day, drawing on expert interviews, footage and computer-generated animations. The first episode focuses on the story of the giant battleships that played a vital role in the naval battles of the Second World War - Hitler's brutal leviathans, Bismarck and Tirpitz(n)

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea
programme.desc: Documentary about Royal Navy destroyer HMS Duncan, following the ups and downs of everyday life for its crew of 280 and capturing dramatic moments in its operations. The crew make final preparations for launch under the watchful eye of Captain Eleanor Stack, before the ship sets out on a seven-month mission to the Mediterranean and Black Sea. Later, HMS Duncan is deep in the heart of the Black Sea when a tense situation develops between the Royal Navy vessel and a Russian ship it has been tracking(n)

programme.title: Send Me No Flowers (1964)
programme.desc: A hypochondriac who mistakenly believes he has only a few weeks to live decides not to tell his wife - and also sets about finding her a suitable second husband to succeed him. Romantic comedy, teaming Rock Hudson and Doris Day with Tony Randall, Paul Lynde and Edward Andrews(n)

programme.title: Fair Wind to Java (1953)
programme.desc: A sailor races to reach a hoard of diamonds stowed on board a Dutch vessel that has sunk in the East Indies. However, the derelict ship lies close to an island inhabited by a fierce tribe with a deep mistrust of strangers, while a volcano is about to erupt at any moment. Seafaring adventure, with Fred MacMurray, Vera Ralston and Robert Douglas(n)

programme.title: In Harm's Way (1965)
programme.desc: Two Navy officers are disgraced in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, one for a disastrous engagement with the enemy and the other for a drunken brawl after learning of his wife's death. They get another chance to prove their worth when they are placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. Second World War drama, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas and Henry Fonda(n)

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (2013)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen's victory in a televised death match makes her a focus for revolution against the totalitarian nation she lives in. The rulers of the regime plot to crush dissent with a new series of games, in which past champions battle it out. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on the second book in Suzanne Collins' trilogy of novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Liam Hemsworth, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Sicario (2015)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is recruited to join an elite government task force based on the border between the US and Mexico, charged with preventing drugs being smuggled into the country. The team is sent on a secret mission, and the new recruit is forced to question everything she believes in order to survive. Crime drama, starring Emily Blunt, Josh Brolin and Benicio Del Toro(n)

programme.title: The Crying Game (1992)
programme.desc: An IRA member holds a British soldier hostage. The pair form an unlikely bond - so when the situation ends in tragedy, the guilt-ridden terrorist sets out to find his former prisoner's lover. But romance is soon on the cards, with devastating results. Neil Jordan's thriller, starring Stephen Rea, Jaye Davidson and Miranda Richardson(n)

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: Director Malachy Harvey's short film portraying a metaphorical kangaroo court in miniature(n)

programme.title: How I Live Now (2013)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to stay with relatives in rural Britain, and falls in love with a local boy. Reports start to come in of conflict erupting in Europe, and as events escalate into a Third World War, she finds herself a fugitive living in a dangerous military police state. Thriller based on Meg Rosoff's novel, starring Saoirse Ronan and Tom Holland(n)

programme.title: Flame of the Barbary Coast (1945)
programme.desc: A cattle rancher falls for a San Francisco saloon-bar singer, but she proves to be in cahoots with a ruthless card sharp who wins all his money. Not to be outdone, he sets out to hone his card-playing skills for a rematch, unaware the city is poised on the brink of disaster. Romantic drama, starring John Wayne, Ann Dvorak and Joseph Schildkraut(n)

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew(n)

programme.title: Beau Geste (1939)
programme.desc: Three brothers are accused of stealing from their aristocratic adopted mother. They seek to salvage their honour by joining the Foreign Legion, battling a rampaging Arab army as well as coming into conflict with their sadistic commanding officer. Action adventure, starring Gary Cooper, Ray Milland, Robert Preston and Brian Donlevy(n)

programme.title: Carry On Nurse (1959)
programme.desc: The patients on the men's ward of Haven Hospital cause more mayhem for the staff than the rest of the hospital combined, forcing the management to send in a formidable matron to control the situation. Feeling aggrieved by her no-nonsense methods, the chaps decide the time is right to get their own back. Comedy, with Kenneth Williams, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey, Shirley Eaton and Leslie Phillips(n)

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen is brought to a secretive underground society following the destruction of the televised deathmatch. She becomes the figurehead of a revolution against the despotic Panem regime, while her friend Peeta remains a captive of its tyrannical president. Part one of the two-part conclusion to the sci-fi adventure series, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Julianne Moore and Donald Sutherland(n)

programme.title: Ghost in the Shell (2017)
programme.desc: A cybernetically enhanced soldier designed to battle the world's deadliest criminals faces a new threat - a terrorist who has developed the ability to hack into people's minds and control them. The mission brings to light disturbing secrets about her own past, and the possibility that her whole life is a lie. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Pilou Asbæk and Juliette Binoche(n)

programme.title: Hunger (2008)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen's fact-based drama depicting the efforts of Irish Republican inmates in Northern Ireland's Maze prison to gain political prisoner status, focusing on the 66-day hunger strike undertaken by Bobby Sands in 1981, which resulted in his death. Starring Michael Fassbender, Stuart Graham, Liam Cunningham and Helena Bereen(n)

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: Director Michael Barwise's textural and poetic visual arts exploration of conflict(n)

programme.title: Snake Eyes (1998)
programme.desc: A corrupt cop seals off all exits in a casino after the fatal shooting of a US Defence Department official - but while frantically searching for the assassin among the 14,000-strong crowd, he is daunted by the sheer scale of the challenge. Thriller from director Brian De Palma, starring Nicolas Cage, Gary Sinise, John Heard and Carla Gugino(n)

programme.title: Mrs Pollifax - Spy (1971)
programme.desc: A bored widow desperate for excitement becomes an agent for the CIA. However, her first mission lands her in an Albanian jail, handcuffed to a handsome stranger. Espionage comedy, written by and starring Rosalind Russell, with Darren McGavin, Nehemiah Persoff and Harold Gould(n)

programme.title: Terror in a Texas Town (1958)
programme.desc: An embittered Scandinavian seaman sets out to avenge the murder of his farmer father, who was killed after refusing to bow to the demands of a ruthless land baron. Western, starring Sterling Hayden, Sebastian Cabot, Carol Kelly and Eugene Martin(n)

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond(n)

programme.title: Attack! (1956)
programme.desc: An American infantry lieutenant fighting in German-occupied Belgium is convinced an inept but well-connected officer is not fit for command. When his unit are wiped out after another of the officer's mistakes, the lieutenant miraculously survives and returns to base seeking revenge. Second World War drama, starring Jack Palance, Eddie Albert, Lee Marvin, Buddy Ebsen and Robert Strauss(n)

programme.title: The Jewel of the Nile (1985)
programme.desc: A novelist travels to the Middle East to become a sheik's official biographer, only to end up being held hostage by him. Her lover joins forces with an old enemy to rescue her, but they get drawn into the hunt for a mysterious ancient treasure that has a connection to an eccentric holy man. Comedy adventure sequel to Romancing the Stone, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito(n)

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The civilisation of Panem is consumed by a bloody civil war. Reluctant rebel leader Katniss Everdeen leads a band of her allies on a mission to end the conflict at one stroke by assassinating the despotic President Snow - but faces many dangers as she closes in on her target. Conclusion of the sci-fi adventure series based on Suzanne Collins' novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman in his final role(n)

programme.title: Project Almanac (2015)
programme.desc: Following the death of his inventor father, a teenager finds plans for a time-travel device. He and his friends decide to build it, and together they embark on an amazing adventure back in time - but soon discover the perils of altering history. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jonny Weston, Sofia Black-D'Elia and Sam Lerner(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted discovers Robin is going on a camping trip with her smarmy colleague Sandy Rivers, and decides to make a last-ditch attempt to win her love - with some help from one of Barney's ex-girlfriends. Meanwhile, Marshall is distraught when he discovers Lily has applied for a fellowship in San Francisco(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall's friends try to help him get over his break-up with Lily - but just when it seems like he might be cheering up, he discovers she may be back in town. Meanwhile, Ted is feeling positive about his new relationship with Robin, but she has yet to tell him about her love of guns. Featuring an appearance by funk musician George Clinton(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is less than thrilled when her honeymoon to Tahiti is cancelled because she has broken her leg, so Joe surprises her with a romantic getaway to a lakeside cabin. However, things go awry and their dream holiday quickly becomes a nightmare. Lennox is unsure about whether to continue her new relationship with Marco and tries to keep it a secret. Comedy, with Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe refuses to allow Dani out on a date with a boy from school, so she tricks Mel into taking her along instead. Lennox and Marco's relationship is revealed when they run into Zander, and a new rivalry erupts between the two men over an internship with an artist(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley realises that she hasn't met any of Ross's friends and decides to throw a cocktail party so she can get acquainted with them. Danny is worried that he knows nothing about his new girlfriend Ashley and goes to great lengths to find out her last name. Bonnie has some serious explaining to do when a valuable item goes missing. Eddie Cibrian guest stars(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben, Riley, Danny and Tucker wonder where their own lives are heading when Bonnie delegates a very important job to them. Riley feels conflicted about her relationships with Ben and Danny, and Bonnie makes a decision that leaves everyone feeling frustrated(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya remains conflicted about Kenneth's ability to handle JJ's needs, but JJ is sure he has made the right decision, especially when Kenneth creates a new look for him(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ makes friends with the cool kids and takes part in the time-honoured tradition of pranking their rival school with a little help from Kenneth, but JJ is crestfallen when he can't accompany his friends to the Homecoming bonfire, as the location isn't wheelchair-accessible. This forces Maya to spring into action, which further alienates JJ. Meanwhile, Ray struggles with the constant clutter in the house and Dylan is blindsided when Kenneth casually points out the real reason why she's such an avid runner(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit, it's up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Elena faces being deported, so Joe offers to marry her so she can stay in the country. Mel refuses to take part in the scheme, but when things begin to go wrong she is forced to protect the couple. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe starts to search for another job as he realises Lennox and Ryder are old enough to look after themselves, however Mel does not want him to go and tries to show him how important he is to her and her family. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie realises how much she misses her ex-boyfriend Brad, so enlists Tucker's help to arrange a reunion. However when the former flame announces he still has feelings for her, Ben's misguided advice leads to him making a rash decision. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Tahj Mowry and Melissa Peterman(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie feels unappreciated for all the work she does for the boys and Emma, and decides to go on strike. However, Ben soon realises how much he needs his mother's help, and comes up with a way to get back into her good books(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya's life takes a surprising turn after she lends a helping hand to her rival Melanie. Dylan joins the basketball team, where her lousy sportsmanship gets results(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ challenges Maya's mentoring tactics when she takes a father and his young son under her wing. Dylan and Ray attend a teenage support group for all the wrong reasons. Meanwhile, Jimmy's gorgeous new TV sends him on a journey to self-betterment. Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friend's sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mitchell gets hot under the collar when Scott turns up at the McQueens dressed as Anita. Meanwhile, Liberty talks to Cindy about her fears of being a surrogate(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident(n)

programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily returns from San Francisco, claiming to have had a great time in the city, but Ted suspects she is covering up how miserable she really feels. Meanwhile, Marshall goes on a string of ill-fated nights out with Barney, trying to meet new women. Comedy, starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin goes for brunch with Ted's parents, but worries they will not like her. However, once the meal has got under way, she discovers they have been hiding a huge secret from him. Meanwhile, Lily and Marshall try to adjust to their new relationship(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox's boyfriend begins to feel neglected when she spends time on her new blog instead of with him. Meanwhile, Joe sets Mel up on a blind date, and in exchange he wants to take out her attractive friend Ariel. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: A friend of Mel decides she wants to have a baby, and believes Joe is the most suitable person to father her child. Meanwhile, Lennox and Haskell disagree over what to do with a rare book when they discover its value. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's rooftop beach gets shut down by Sondra, the president of the board of the apartment building, so he plans to overthrow her and do the job himself. Meanwhile, Bonnie and Riley go on a double date with Brad and his twin brother Tad(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben arranges to meet up with a woman whose phone he has found, however when he ends up running late the father has to send Tucker in his place. Meanwhile, Riley enlists Danny to help her take revenge on an old rival, and Bonnie creates a new business slogan. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Part one of two. The DiMeos travel to England so Maya can ask her estranged father (John Cleese) for a loan to buy their house, while Jimmy tries to ensure JJ has a great trip(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Part two of two. Maya must choose between asking her father for money to buy their house or establishing a lasting relationship with him. Ray strives to bond with his new British family, only to discover that Dylan is the one with a surprising connection to them. JJ shows Kenneth a good time off-the-clock, and Jimmy inadvertently finds love.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel dates a divorced man whose ex-wife is going out with Joe, and a disagreement arises over custody of the former couple's son. Meanwhile, Lennox is tempted to get a tattoo, and Ryder is surprised to find he misses being in school(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe lands a job at City Hall, he gets caught up in another potential financial scandal, which could put Mel's career at risk. Meanwhile, Lennox is torn between her boyfriend Zander and Archer, her good-looking co-star who has to kiss her in the school play. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Now that she knows the truth about Margot, Riley decides to look for her biological father too, and uses her parents' high-school yearbook as a guide. With a little help from Ben, she narrows down the possible candidates to an easy-going pastry chef and a high-flying lawyer. Comedy, starring Chelsea Kane and Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley looks forward to meeting Philip's sister when she visits from England, but her excitement vanishes when it becomes clear his sibling is unimpressed with his taste in girlfriends. Meanwhile, Danny's contract negotiations with the Rangers are put in jeopardy. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya is less than thrilled when Kenneth interferes in her business plans with Melanie. Ray begs JJ to cast him opposite Izzy - his new crush - in JJ's next movie, which has unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Dylan is impressed by Jimmy's band(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Dylan is horrified to realise that people see her as a mini version of Maya and makes a point of exerting her individuality. JJ and Ray learn to cope with their feelings for their shared crush, Izzy. Kenneth turns to an unwilling Jimmy for help with Joyce(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. programme.title: First Dates

At the end of their restaurant meal, the couples decide whether they want to take things further, and if the answer is no, the next date sitting opposite them could be a viewer(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during a single week in December 2015, including The Royal Variety Performance, the Turner Prize, Meet the Psychopaths, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Secret Life of 6 Year Olds, Single White Female and the news. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Brenda enlists Jeff and Audrey's help when she does the catering for an event at Columbia University, but it seems the guests are more impressed with Jeff's bartending skills than his wife's waitressing. Meanwhile, Timmy's parents pay a visit, and worried Russell will embarrass him, he decides not to invite him out to dinner with them. Comedy, with Patrick Warburton and David Spade(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Ray's attempt to manipulate Maya over a broken promise of mother-son time backfires when she calls his bluff. JJ tries a new aide after he and Kenneth arrange to spend a day apart. Jimmy can't handle Dylan's teen angst when she invites a boy over(n)

programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey enrol in a cookery class, already attended by Adam and Jen, as a way of spending more time together. However, things soon get competitive between the two couples. programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff invites his old college friend Heidi round to show Audrey that she does not have romantic feelings for him, but the plan backfires when she makes a shocking confession. Meanwhile, Adam designs a test to help him choose his best man, and Timmy announces he is leaving Russell's employment(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney gives Ted advice after he has his first big fight with Robin, while Lily persuades them to make up. However, later that night the friends go to a party for lawyers - and Lily and Robin are told Ted has left with another woman. Neil Patrick Harris and Josh Radnor star(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily moves into Barney's flat to escape her rat-infested home, and though he initially resents her presence, he soon sees the benefits of having her around. Meanwhile, Marshall befriends a fellow law student who has also just split up with his girlfriend. Comedy, starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel calls on Joe for a favour when she pretends to her date, Travis, that she is an excellent cook, and is asked to put her money where her mouth is. Meanwhile, Lennox is shocked when she finds out that one of her friends has a crush on Ryder. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder turns to Joe for advice about investing in stocks and shares - but then fails to take him up on a tip, which turns out to be a profitable one. Meanwhile, Mel tries to hide her delight when Lennox and Haskell break up. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager.
